title: Cambodia: World Heritage Committee must ensure UNESCO decision addresses Angkor forced evictions
highlights: Angkor forced evictions Member states at next week’s UNESCO World Heritage Committee must address human rights violations carried out by Cambodian authorities affecting thousands of families at the Angkor historical site, Amnesty International said.
